name: Curry Lobster Risotto
recipeIngredient: 1 Teaspoon Fresh Ginger Root, diced fine
recipeInstructions:
Heat peanut oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add shallots, onions, carrot, celery, ginger, garlic, curry powder, and rice. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are soft (about 5 minutes). Stir in tomatoes and half of the stock. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered until the tomatoes are tender.
Gradually add more stock, allowing each addition to be absorbed before adding the next, until the rice is al dente and the stock has evaporated. Stir in coriander, butter, and cheese over high heat for 2-3 minutes. Season with salt, to taste, then stir in lobster meat. Serve immediately.
